title: guatteria villosa
intro: Guatteria villosa is a plant species that belongs to the Annonaceae family and is also known as the "guanacaste" or "guatteria" tree. The Guatteria villosa has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Guatteria villosa is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions.
